title: Union picketing and political campaigning curbed under proposed Alberta bill
author: Michelle Bellefontaine
notes: Bill 32 introduced. Alberta would become only jurisdiction in Canada requiring union members to opt-in for political-activity dues. NDP: 'blatant attack on working people.' AUPE filed constitutional challenge. Additional/better source for EVT-053 (Bill 32). Note: R-068 now also has updated URL; either can be used.
